title: Raja Raja Cozhandhaan Lyrics Sahadevan Mahadevan
stanzas:
Raja Raja Sozhandhaan
pottu vacha road idhu
Cholan potta roadula
pallavan bus odudhu

mannar aatchi ingae
maarithaan pochu
mandhiringa aatchi
vandhu naalum aachu

kalaignar silayai
yaaru ingae odachadhu
kurangu kayyil
poomaalai kedachadhu

naanum neeyum
naatta thirutha
paattu padippomaa
naayi vazha
nimutha nammaal
mudiyumaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Raja Raja Cozhandhaan celebrates the spirit of joy and community, reflecting on the changes in society over time.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for Raja Raja Cozhandhaan is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features renowned singers Mano and Prabhakaran.

When was the song released?

Raja Raja Cozhandhaan was released on November 14, 1988.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Raja Raja Cozhandhaan, the lively lyrics and upbeat tempo create an atmosphere of celebration and nostalgia. The song reflects on the changes in society while maintaining a sense of joy and community spirit. It evokes emotions of happiness and togetherness, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The energetic performance by the singers adds to the charm, ensuring its place as a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Raja Raja Cozhandhaan is a vibrant folk number that captures the essence of celebration and nostalgia. The unique collaboration of talented singers brings life to this classic tune, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the rhythmic beats and lively lyrics that evoke memories of joyous gatherings and festivities.
stanzaMeanings: This is the road where the king's rule was established, and now a bus is running on it.
The king's rule has changed here, and the rule of the people has come for a long time.
The rule has changed, but the road itself hasn't changed.
Who has broken the statue of the artist here? A monkey has taken a garland in its hand.
It's only us who have completely taken over the streets.
The past has moved forward, but is there any pain left?
Hey, who is going to the market now?
You and I can start a party and gather wealth.
If we can't find work, then we can see.
In the country, how many parties are there? It's just a handful of people.
No one knows which small party is there; it can't survive in court.
Why has the party here become two or three?
If it comes, the greedy will lose their grip.
Can you and I learn the song of the country? Can we survive like dogs?
This is the road where the king's rule was established, and now a bus is running on it.
The king's rule has changed here, and the rule of the people has come for a long time.
The rule has changed, but the road itself hasn't changed.
